$comment: Defines which test types apply to each package category and coverage targets. Edit this file to adjust weights without modifying the C# script.

categories.name: Full
categories.description: Core modules with full test coverage: all 5 test types apply

categories.name: Logic
categories.description: Modules with testable logic but no persistence layer. Integration tests not applicable.

categories.name: Provider
categories.description: Database providers (ADO/Dapper/EF/MongoDB). Most coverage comes from integration tests.

categories.name: Transport
categories.description: Message transports. Real broker not available in unit tests.

categories.name: Cloud
categories.description: Cloud/framework integrations. Require runtime environment for full testing.

categories.name: CDC
categories.description: Change Data Capture. Connectors are internal; testable through options, positions, and integration.

categories.name: Validation
categories.description: Validation providers. Small surface area, fully testable.

categories.name: DistributedLock
categories.description: Distributed lock providers. Integration tests need real backends.

categories.name: Caching
categories.description: Caching providers beyond base Encina.Caching module.

categories.name: TestingLibrary
categories.description: Published testing helper packages used by Encina consumers. Should have unit test coverage.

categories.name: Excluded
categories.description: Internal test infrastructure and specialized analyzers. Not measured for coverage.
